hero.title: QUALITY ASSURANCE
hero.heading: QUALITY ASSURANCE
hero.description: Quality Is Not A Slogan. It Is Built Into Selection, Fabrication, Inspection, Packing, And Shipment.

standard.title: OUR STANDARD
standard.heading: QUALITY MEANS DOING THE RIGHT WORK BEFORE ANYONE SEES IT
standard.text: When A Stone Piece Is Finally Installed, Most People Never See The Measurement, Sorting, Dry-Lay, Repair, Protection, And Packing Work Behind It. We Do. That Is Why Our Inspection Process Happens Before The Shipment Leaves The Workshop.

checks.title: COLOR RANGE CONTROL
checks.desc: Natural Stone Always Has Variation. We Sort Slabs By Batch, Tone, Vein Movement, And Application Area So Large-Area Installation Can Stay Visually Consistent.

checks.title: THICKNESS & FLATNESS
checks.desc: We Check Thickness, Flatness, Edge Quality, And Surface Finish Before Packing. Countertops, Stairs, And Wall Pieces Receive Additional Dimensional Review.

checks.title: SIX-SIDE INSPECTION
checks.desc: Each Piece Is Checked On The Face, Back, And Edges For Chips, Cracks, Finish Issues, Cutting Accuracy, And Edge Detail Before It Leaves The Workshop.

checks.title: SURFACE PROTECTION
checks.desc: Marble And Custom Pieces Can Receive Penetrating Protection Treatments Based On Application, Finish, And Destination Requirements.

packaging.title: PACKING & DELIVERY
packaging.heading: THE JOURNEY CONTINUES AFTER FABRICATION
packaging.description: We Treat Export Packing As Seriously As Fabrication, Because Good Stone Still Needs To Arrive Safely.

steps.title: REINFORCED WOODEN CRATES
steps.desc: Crates Are Sized For The Order, Lined With EPE Foam, Separated With Cardboard, And Strapped For Container Loading.

steps.title: MOISTURE PROTECTION
steps.desc: Desiccants, Waterproof Wrapping, And Added Protection For High-Value Pieces Help Reduce Moisture Risks During Sea Freight.

steps.title: SHIPMENT TRACKING
steps.desc: We Provide Packing Photos, Marks, Packing Lists, And Shipment Coordination From Loading Through Destination Port Updates.

packingSite.title: PACKING SITE
packingSite.heading: EVERY CRATE IS PACKED WITH CARE

cta.heading: RELIABLE QUALITY COMES FROM A RELIABLE PROCESS
cta.description: If Your Project Has Specific Inspection, Packing, Or Documentation Requirements, We Can Follow Your Standards.
